task.en: Using Finder, create this nested folder structure on the Desktop: `~/Desktop/Archive/2025/Q4/`. Then, inside the `Q4` folder, create a plain-text file named `notes.txt` whose contents include the text `quarterly archive` somewhere in the file. Exact capitalization and extra whitespace do not matter — the folder structure and the file location are what count.

grading_command: F="$HOME/Desktop/Archive/2025/Q4/notes.txt"; [ -f "$F" ] && tr 'A-Z' 'a-z' < "$F" | tr -s ' ' | grep -q 'quarterly archive' && echo True || echo False
